---
name: Feature or spec change
about: Propose new behavior, a new hook idea, or a change to written specs—aligned with spec-driven development.
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Goal

What problem does this solve for users of these hooks?

## Spec hook family / files

- Which **[`specs/hook-families/`](specs/hook-families/)** doc or **[`specs/`](specs/)** file would need to change (or be added)? If unsure, say “TBD” and what behavior you want.

See **[`specs/README.md`](specs/README.md)** (reading order) and **[`specs/project-spec.md`](specs/project-spec.md)**.

## Proposed behavior

Bullet points are fine. If this is CLI-facing, mention flags / hook `id` if you have a preference.

## Tests

Rough idea of what should be covered (fixtures under `tests/fixtures/yaml/`, pytest cases)—optional if you’re opening a discussion first.

## Are you willing to submit a PR?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Maybe / need guidance
- [ ] No—discussion only
